name: Uniswap V3 LP Rebalance
description: Create or rebalance a Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity position with a tick range centered on the current pool price. Exits the existing position, collects all fees, computes the optimal token split for the new range, rebalances via a swap, then mints a fresh position centered around the current price.
triggers: my uniswap LP is out of range
create a new WETH/USDC LP position

params.name: token0
params.description: First token of the LP pair (e.g. WETH)

params.name: token1
params.description: Second token of the LP pair (e.g. USDC)

params.name: rangeWidthBps
params.description: Total width of the new range in basis points (e.g. 1000 = ±5% around current price)

params.name: driftBufferBps
params.description: Optional price drift buffer in bps for automation trigger threshold

steps.label: Remove all liquidity from current position
Collect accrued fees and freed liquidity tokens
Compute optimal token amounts for the new price range
Swap to achieve optimal token ratio for new range
Mint new LP position centered around current price

examples.input: Rebalance my WETH/USDC 0.05% LP to a ±5% range
My WBTC/WETH 0.3% LP is out of range, re-center with 20% range
Create a new WETH/USDC LP position centered on current price with ±2% range
Auto-rebalance my WETH/USDC Uniswap V3 LP position when it goes out of range, ±5% range with a 2% buffer, and compound fees

conditionTemplate.description: Triggers rebalance when the position price moves outside the configured range plus the buffer zone. Uses shouldRebalance(positionManager, tokenId, bufferBps) from the UniswapV3LPHelper contract.
